content.en:
The inner world.

At this time, this place had already been turned into nothingness by Ye Tian, and the countless continents that had been built by the original inner world had turned into nothingness, and everything had returned to primitiveness, which was a prerequisite for opening up the source sea of will.

Immediately, countless volitional forces poured into this world, operating according to the secret technique of the new volitional world, and the power of the will continued to merge into the inner world, and began to form a source of will, constantly transforming this inner world and transforming it into a sea of will sources.

However, the inner world is not an ordinary particle cell, so it takes endless resources and time to transform such a world into a sea of will.

Fortunately, Ye Tian had obtained too many treasures from those Moshan prisoners, and he could take out a few treasures at will and trade them with the six legendary lords or other immortal realm lords, and he could obtain a large amount of resources, which was enough for him to complete this cultivation.

The years passed.

Eternal years have passed, and the time it takes to open up the Will Source Sea this time is many times longer than the time it takes to open up the Will World, even if it is just an experiment, but this time must be wasted, this is a key test that affects the cultivation of the Will World.

If he was able to succeed, he could not only break the shackles of his will and be promoted to a fourth-order eternal will, but he could even cultivate to a fifth-order will, or even a higher will.

If he fails, he will not be able to break through 090, and he will have to recreate a new world of will.

About ten eternal years passed, and the Willpower Source Sea was finally opened up by Ye Tian.

At this time.

The Will Source Sea is filled with endless will power, but Ye Tian's current state is not particularly good, for this breakthrough, the other will worlds in his body have almost all collapsed, but the Will Source Sea has still opened up, this is success.

Next, Ye Tian began to experiment again and again, striving to open up the source of the will to pay the least price, and there will be no sequelae, this requires many tests, so it takes a long time.

However, for Ye Tian, it was worth spending some more time.

In this way, Ye Tian opened up the Will Source Sea again and again, and the experience of opening up the Will Source Sea became more and more proficient, and the price he paid became less and less.

About 3,000 eternal years have passed, Ye Tian has tried 300 times, and he can already open up the sea of will source at a very low cost, and the consequences can be slowly recovered, without affecting his foundation.

So on this day, Ye Tian began to formally condense the will source sea.

Rumble!!!!!!

The Will Source Sea was opened up, and then Ye Tian began to repair the sequelae, and after the repair was complete, he could reopen a new world of will.

In the world of will, the number of Xu'er surrounds the sea of will sources, and gradually increases.

After a long time, the world of will returned to 99,999, and soon condensed again, reaching 100,000 will worlds.

It was at this time that the metamorphosis began.

Ye Tian's will power continued to condense, and it was powerful at an incredible speed, which was to break the shackles of the will of the third-order eternal will and lead to the fourth-order eternal will.

After a long time, Ye Tian's will had all undergone a transformation, and he had already become a fourth-order eternal will.

The fourth-order Eternal Will is nearly ten times more powerful than the Third-Order Eternal Will, and even the ordinary Eternal Realm Lord can be shattered with just the will, which is the strength of the Fourth-Order Eternal Will.

The willpower has been raised to the fourth order, Ye Tian's strength has increased greatly, even if he doesn't use the Mixed Yuan Order, an eternal treasure, his real combat power is comparable to a relatively weak Legendary Realm Lord, if he cooperates with the Mixed Yuan Order, among the six legendary lords of the space-time territory, he may be ranked in the middle.

Moreover, it is relatively easy for Ye Tian to open up the world of will now, so in a certain period of time, his fourth-order will will improve a lot, and his strength still has a certain period of improvement.

As for the degree of fusion between the will and the body, it is also rapidly improving, and it may not take too many years for him to be able to fuse ninety percent of his body with the will and step into the realm of the nine-step immortal realm lord.

In the following years, Ye Tian made every effort to improve his cultivation, accelerate the fusion of his will and body, and strive to ascend to the realm of the Nine-Step Immortal Realm Lord as soon as possible.

At the same time, he is also helping some geniuses of the Terran Race, opening up many treasure lands, and gradually giving birth to several Eternal Realm Lords of the Terran.

It can be said that the human race is now almost the number one race in the source sea.

And from beginning to end, Ye Tian did not abandon the Dark Forbidden Domain, perhaps many forces did not attach much importance to the Source Sea, thinking that the Source Sea had no resources, but the area was very large.

But Ye Tian attached great importance to the Source Sea, after all, no matter how good the space-time territory was, it had to be attached to the Source Sea, and only the Source Sea had the most perfect innate eternal rules.

In this way, Ye Tian's body has been using the Mixed Yuan Order to improve his cultivation in the Dark Forbidden Domain.

100,000 eternal years!

200,000 eternal years!

300,000 eternal years!

Finally, on this day, Ye Tian's will and body had fused to ninety percent, and he had become a nine-step immortal realm lord realm, but if he wanted to completely fuse his body with his will and thus step into the legendary realm lord realm, it would take more time.

And Ye Tian didn't care about these times at all, and cultivated with all his might.

At the very least, he could see hope, and there were several nine-step immortal realm lords in the space-time territory, and there was still no hope of stepping into the level of the legendary realm lord, which showed how difficult this step was.

If it weren't difficult, the space-time territory wouldn't have only six Legendary Realm Lords.

this day.

Ye Tian was cultivating in the Dark Forbidden Domain, and a half-step Eternal Realm of the Human Race reported a message that a strange vision had appeared somewhere in the Source Sea, but they couldn't find the location of the vision, and they couldn't even fly to that location.

After Ye Tian got the news, he dared to go to that position as soon as possible.

Source sea, the treasure land of Shulong.

Ye Tian came here and saw a world, and in the center of the world, a leaf was being bred.

His will wanted to get closer, but he couldn't.

"Eternal treasure!"

Ye Tian guessed.

If that's the case, then it's a terrible thing, and it's probably a true eternal treasure rather than a space-time projection

Hiss!

The void cracked, and a figure emerged.

The man was shrouded in black mist and exuded an eerie aura.

"I've seen the Lord of the Mist!"

Ye Tian said politely.

The person in front of him was one of the six legendary realm lords, and he was quite mysterious.

The Dark Mist Lord ignored Ye Tian at all, just staring at the leaves in this vision with burning eyes. _
